rulings.Case Title: UMPQUA BANK A STATE CHARTERED BANK VS. RENKA PROP. LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Instructions Re Payment Of Umpqua Bank Attorneys Fees And Costs; Declaration Of Blake C. Alsbrook; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Robert B. Kaplan In Support Thereof Filed Separately Herewith
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday November 08, 2019 Line 2. OTHER KEVIN SINGER Notice Of Motion And Motion For Instructions Re Payment Of Umpqua Bank Attorneys Fees And Costs; Declaration Of Blake C. Alsbrook; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Robert B. Kaplan In Support Thereof Filed Separately Herewith is DENIED without prejudice. While the contractual provision provides for recovery of reasonable attorney's fees, no authority is cited for the proposition that the determination of payment of such fees is appropriate at this stage of the litigation. Motion for entry of judgment is calendared for December 12, 2019 and there is no reason attorney's fees should not be addressed by that motion. When such fees are reduced to judgment, the receiver shall proceed in accordance with its authority under the receivership order to pay any such judgment. Opposition is stricken. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTINA CHEN VS. ELENA LAUCHUNG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Descovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday November 08, 2019 Line 8. PLAINTIFF CHRISTINA CHEN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Descovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to provide complete verified responses to Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories and Request for production within 2 business days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,610 to be paid within 5 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FRANKLIN LOO VS. MICHAEL MARTINEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday November 08, 2019 Line 10. DEFENDANT MICHAEL MARTINEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer.
